title: White Startline
overview: Howan leaves her snowy village for the big city to try and debut as an artist.

title: Yell and Response
overview: After they sing together in the street, Ruhuyu and Delmin show Howan around Under North Zawa.

title: On The Bike
overview: A band of high school delinquents called DOKONJOFINGER do community service, and Howan looks for a part-time job.

title: No Problem!!
overview: The girls have a hot pot party to celebrate Howan's job interview, but something's up with Ruhuyu and Delmin.

title: Parallelism Crown
overview: At the concert of the popular band, REIJINGSIGNAL, Howan is chosen from the audience to go to the backstage party.

title: Heromeans
overview: Himeko's been acting strange, so Howan tries different things to get her to open up.

title: Endless Waltz of Crimson Flashing Wings with Guts
overview: Mashumairesh!. and DOKONJOFINGER have training camps, and DOKONJOFINGER ends up in a curling competition.

title: Neon Tetra no Sora
overview: The newly-formed Mashumairesh!. gets a challenge to play in a battle of the bands.

title: TEPPAN IN THE BAG
overview: DOKONJOFINGER needs to decide what they want out of being in a band together.

title: Platform
overview: Himeko is having trouble coming up with ideas for a new song, so the other three try different things to help.

title: Your Rhapsody
overview: It's the day before Mashumairesh!. is scheduled to play at Midi Rock, and the girls are excited and nervous about their performance.

title: Mashumairesh!!
overview: It's the day of Midi City 6969 Festival, and the girls of Mashumairesh!! are rushing to the venue. Will they make it in time?
